title: Patelai 50 Pieces Cosmetic Spatula Disposable Makeup Frosted Tip Spatula Plastic Makeup Tools Spoon Cosmetic Mask Spoon Spatulas Facial Cream Scoop Mask Spoon Stick for DIY and Sampling(Random Color)
description:
Package contents: there are 50 pieces cosmetic spatulas in your package, which can be applied for your share with you loved ones and spare use, the quantity of 6 colors are randomly assigned, including pink, purple, blue, green, yellow, orange, a variety of color options for you to choose
Serviceable material: the disposable makeup frosted tip spatula is made by PP plastic, which is safe and reliable, not harmful to your skin, smooth surface without rough and pointed edge of the cosmetic spoon will not hurt your face or hand, so it is suitable for you to use
Dimension: each makeup tip spatula is approx. 2.8 cm/ 1.1 inches in width and 12.5 cm/ 4.92 inches in length, due to its suitable size, you can put it into your bag or suitcase, will not take up too much space, light and small for easy storage or transportation, you will not find it difficult to carry and fell tired to use, you can easily grip it
Disposable or reusable: the brush cosmetic spoon can be disposable or reusable, you can use it for one time, or reuse it by simply cleaning it up, just use water to wash it, and you can use it repeatedly according to your needs
Wide applications: the plastic makeup tools spoon is suitable for make-up, skin care products such as facial cream, body cream, mask and so on, also fit for sampling beauty products and more, which keep your items fresh and clean; It is also widely applied at home and in beauty salons, and novices will not find it difficult to use
reviews_5s: Came as advertised, multiple colors! Will use for my hair gel.This works really well, it is thick enough to scoop without flipping or flexing. To spread less contaminates in my makeup, masks, or lotions I will order this again when I run out. The shipping was very fast, packaging done well to ship products in, and I love the color choices.I use these for my potted lotions and my shower sugar scrubs. There is enough so when my 3 year old steals like 10 I still have some for me! They are great quality! Highly recommend!I bought these cute spoons for my acrylic pouring projects. They're great for mixing paint, strong, durable and versatile. Paint wipes off easily or peels off if dried. Theses spoons can be used for so many different projects.These are great. Wide end is ever so slightly flexible. They are the perfect shape for me, perfect to ‘scrape’ the side of my silicone bowls I use to mix my acrylic paint. If I need more I will buy themGreat for cosmetics. Well made and are sturdy.. Hold up well and love that they are disposable. Will purchase againNo more cream under nails.Love these.
